form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes off a 40 day let-up. Most recently 2nd of 10 at Greyville All Weather on February 27 over 1200m, 2.25 len behind Kali Bwana carrying 57.5kg at $2.80. The race before that 3rd of 8 at this track on January 25 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Winter In London with 53.5kg at $2.70. Working up to a win. Worth following.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Saddle slipped backwards in the running.
Between the 300m and 100m, carried out on two occasions by Sovereign Gem.
Shortly after the start, carried in marginally by Malshana Mou.
In the concluding stages, was brushed by Love The USA.

form.formComment: Most recently 7th of 10 at this track on April 5 over 1400m, 6 len behind Lilting Song with 60kg at $101. The run before that second last of 10 at this track on March 15 over 1200m, 26 len behind Luthando carrying 56kg at $126. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced to give ground to the field from the 200m.
Jumped awkwardly and carried out by Olive Grove at the start. Lost 1 length.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 40-day let-up. Most recently 5th of 10 at Greyville All Weather on February 27 over 1200m, 5 len behind Kali Bwana carrying 57.7kg at $15. The run before that 4th of 10 at Greyville All Weather on January 28 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Nebulous carrying 57.5kg at $8. Should be right in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Steadied at the 500m when close to the heels of Ruth's Magic.
Lost one length. Bumped by Call Me Jane leaving the starting stalls.
Hung in, in the concluding stages.

form.formComment: At the latest run 4th of 9 at this track on March 15 over 1000m, 6 len behind Fleur De Ling with 53.6kg at $101. The start before that ran last of 11 at this track on February 15 over 1400m, 10 len behind Spirit Of Shimla carrying 56kg at $101. Beaten comfortably last start but is capable of better.
